name: NexoWatt EOS admin UI v13
base: v12 accepted full-width header + horizontal navigation
changes: keeps the accepted v12 layout with full header and horizontal navigation
removes the custom EOS Abmelden/logout button because it caused broken redirects
restyles System/Basiseinstellungen dialogs with readable EOS form cards, tabs, map and action bar
keeps readable adapter description overlays and EOS Dienste/Instanzen styling
leaves upstream React/Vite runtime bundles untouched
layout: full-width header + horizontal navigation rail + full-width content
